title: bidens serrulata
intro: Bidens serrulata, also known as tickseed, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and serrated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Bidens serrulata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Bidens serrulata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
